name: Navattic Interactive Demo Platform API
what_it_does: Navattic interactive product demo platform REST API for B2B SaaS sales and marketing teams to create, manage, and embed interactive product demos without engineering resources, track prospect engagement, and qualify leads through demo interaction analytics. Enables AI agents to manage demo creation and configuration for automated demo production, handle embed code and sharing link generation for demo distribution automation, access demo view and engagement tracking for prospect intelligence automation, retrieve click path and interaction analytics for buyer behavior analysis automation, manage CTA and form integration for lead capture automation, handle demo variant and personalization for targeted demo automation, access HubSpot and Salesforce integration for lead routing automation, retrieve demo performance and conversion analytics for sales effectiveness automation, manage team and template management for demo library automation, and integrate Navattic with CRM, marketing automation, and sales engagement platforms for end-to-end demo-led sales workflow.
use_cases: Creating interactive product demos from sales content automation agents
Tracking demo engagement from prospect intelligence agents
Personalizing demos by persona from targeted content agents
Routing engaged prospects from demo-qualified lead agents
not_for: Full product sandbox environments (use TestBox or Demostack for live sandboxes)
Engineering-built custom demos (use Reprise for custom-coded demo environments)
Video demo creation (use Loom or Vidyard for recorded video demos)
best_when: A B2B SaaS sales or marketing team wanting AI agents to automate interactive demo creation, prospect engagement tracking, lead qualification, and CRM integration through Navattic's no-code interactive demo platform.
avoid_when: CHROME EXTENSION REQUIRED FOR DEMO CAPTURE: Navattic demo creation requires Chrome browser extension to capture web application UI screenshots; automated demo creation pipeline must coordinate with Chrome extension-based capture; automated demo creation without capture extension cannot record application UI for demo content. DEMO PERSONALIZATION REQUIRES MANUAL VARIANT CREATION: Navattic demo personalization by persona or industry requires manually created demo variants; automated personalization routing via API selects from pre-existing variants; automated personalization for new personas requires upfront variant creation. PROSPECT-LEVEL ANALYTICS REQUIRE EMAIL IDENTIFICATION: Navattic prospect-level engagement tracking requires prospect email identification (CTA form submission or UTM parameter matching); automated prospect intelligence without email identification creates anonymous session data that cannot be matched to CRM contacts.

auth.notes: Navattic uses API key for authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ. Founded 2020 by Caitlin Hallas and Adison Clark. Backed by Craft Ventures, Bonfire Ventures ($14M raised). Products: Interactive demo builder, engagement analytics, CRM integration, lead capture, demo templates. Integrations: HubSpot, Salesforce, Marketo, Slack, Zapier. GDPR. Serves B2B SaaS sales and marketing teams. Competes with Reprise, Demostack, and Storylane for interactive demos.

pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Craft Ventures backed. Monthly subscription from $500/mo. 14-day trial. Annual discount.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; demo and analytics queries throttled; webhooks for view, completion, and CTA events

known_agent_gotchas: DEMO CREATION REQUIRES CHROME EXTENSION CAPTURE — NOT FULLY API-DRIVEN: Navattic demo creation depends on Chrome extension for UI capture; automated demo production pipeline cannot replace Chrome extension capture with API; automated demo management via API handles existing demos but not initial capture-based creation

PROSPECT IDENTIFICATION REQUIRES UTM OR FORM SUBMISSION: Navattic anonymous demo sessions cannot be attributed to CRM contacts without prospect identification; automated lead qualification must ensure prospect identification mechanism (UTM parameters, CTA form) before triggering CRM update; automated CRM update from anonymous demo session creates unattributed lead records

ENGAGEMENT SCORE CALCULATION USES PROPRIETARY MODEL: Navattic prospect engagement score combines step completion, time spent, and interaction events using proprietary formula; automated lead scoring integration must verify Navattic score normalization before combining with CRM scoring model; automated score integration using raw Navattic score without normalization creates inaccurate composite lead scores

DEMO EMBED vs DEMO LINK TRACKING SEPARATE: Navattic provides embed code (iframe) and standalone link for demo distribution; engagement analytics differ slightly between embed and link tracking; automated demo performance reporting must specify distribution method when comparing engagement rates

WEBHOOK PAYLOAD INCLUDES DEMO VERSION AT TIME OF VIEW: Navattic webhooks include demo version seen by prospect; automated demo update without version management creates analytics comparison issues between old and new demo version engagement
agent_readiness.security_notes: Interactive demo. GDPR. API key. US. Demo engagement and prospect data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Interactive demo. GDPR. API key. US. Demo and prospect data.
